title: PhD
biography: Svante Paabo is a Swedish geneticist who pioneered the field of paleogenomics by sequencing the Neanderthal genome and discovering the Denisovans. Nobel Prize 2022.
aiSummary: Svante Paabo is a genetics specialist at Max Planck Institute for Evolutionary Anthropology. Based in Leipzig.

affiliations.hospitalName: Max Planck Institute for Evolutionary Anthropology

citations.title: Dynamics of mitochondrial DNA evolution in animals: amplification and sequencing with conserved primers.
citations.journal: Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences
